result:
ChatGPT browser-control SDK commands

workflow:
- ask: Ask ChatGPT in a new or selected thread, optionally with files, wait/read, downloads, and reports.
- askInThread: Open or claim an existing thread by URL, conversation id, title, or search query, then ask and read.
- askWithFiles: Attach absolute local file paths, optionally set mode, ask, wait, and read.
- askAndDownload: Ask ChatGPT to produce a visible downloadable output and save the latest exposed file.
- runMessages: Run sequential prompts where later prompts can use earlier step data.
- runner.run: Agents-style facade: run a visible ChatGPT browser-control agent against input, files, thread, existing-tab, mode, and response options.
- responses.create: Narrow Responses-shaped adapter over the visible ChatGPT browser-control runner; rejects unsupported API-only fields before prompt submission.
- copyLatest: Copy or DOM-read the latest assistant response with Markdown-first fidelity.
- runPlan: Execute an inline SequencePlan or named macro through the existing sequence engine.
- new-ask-read: Named macro: open a new thread, ask, wait, and read Markdown.
- find-open-ask-read: Named macro: search history, open the first match, ask, wait, and read Markdown.
- find-open-copy-latest: Named macro: search history, open the first match, and copy/read the latest response.
- attach-ask-read: Named macro: open a new thread, attach files, ask, wait, and read Markdown.
- ask-and-download: Named macro: ask in a new thread and download the latest file affordance.
- two-turn: Named macro: run two sequential prompts in a new thread.
diagnostic:
- doctor-upload: Named macro: preflight bridge, login, and upload permission remediation.
- doctor: Preflight browser bridge, login, upload, download, clipboard, mode, and tool readiness.
report:
- redacted-run-report: Named macro: create a redacted report for a supplied CommandResult.
- createReport: Write a durable redacted run report for a command result.
primitive:
- session.bootstrap: Attach to ChatGPT in Chrome and detect login/blocker state.
- threads.new: Open a new ChatGPT thread.
- threads.search: Search visible ChatGPT history by query.
- threads.open: Open a thread by URL, conversation id, title, or search result.
- messages.compose: Fill the composer without submitting.
- messages.submit: Submit the current composer contents.
- messages.ask: Compose, submit, optionally wait, and optionally read.
- messages.wait: Wait for the latest assistant response to stabilize.
- messages.readLatest: Read the latest message as Markdown, normalized text, blocks, or HTML.
- messages.waitAndRead: Wait for completion and read the latest message.
- files.attach: Attach absolute local file paths through visible ChatGPT upload controls.
- files.downloadLatest: Download the latest visible ChatGPT file affordance.
- response.copy: Click Copy response and return clipboard Markdown, with DOM fallback.
- modes.set: Select a visible model or effort candidate when unambiguous.
- tools.select: Select a visible ChatGPT tool when unambiguous.
